page_metadata.biotools__summary: JABAWS stands for JAva Bioinformatics Analysis Web Services. It is a collection of web services for bioinformatics, and currently provides services that make it easy to access well-known multiple sequence alignment and protein disorder prediction programs from Jalview.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: JABAWS stands for JAva Bioinformatics Analysis Web Services.
